name: oracledb
description: Connect, query, and interact with Oracle Databases and their data.

oracle_connection_string.title: Connection String
oracle_connection_string.description: Oracle connection string (e.g., host:port/service_name or TNS alias)

oracle_wallet.title: Wallet Path
oracle_wallet.description: (Optional) Path to the Oracle Wallet directory

oracle_use_oci.title: Use OCI
oracle_use_oci.description: (Optional) Set to true to use the OCI (thick client) driver (Default: false)
